$comment: The verb index — the transport-neutral source of truth for Sextant's domain verbs (ADR-0017). No backend operations appear here (ADR-0013 rule 1); the NATS realization lives in nats-binding.md. 'delivery' is the property that drives which faces expose a verb and the CLI<->MCP conformance test (TASK-28): one-shot and pull-batch verbs appear on every face; push-stream verbs are CLI/SDK-only (on Claude Code they reach an agent via the channel push, not as an MCP tool). Input/output keys name the parameters; types are informal hints, with 'lexicon' referencing lexicons/.

verbs.name: message.publish
verbs.summary: Publish a typed message on a subject.

verbs.name: message.read
verbs.summary: Fetch a batch of messages on a subject since a cursor (the pull/catch-up path; the cursor is the stream sequence).

verbs.name: message.subscribe
verbs.summary: Stream messages matching a subject until stopped (the live tail).

verbs.name: clients.list
verbs.summary: List the clients registered right now (presence-only).

verbs.name: artifact.create
verbs.summary: Create a new artifact from a lexicon record (fails if the name exists).

verbs.name: artifact.update
verbs.summary: Compare-and-set update of an artifact (the single-author discipline).

verbs.name: artifact.get
verbs.summary: Read an artifact's current value and revision.

verbs.name: artifact.watch
verbs.summary: Stream changes to an artifact — initial value, updates, and deletes — until stopped.
